name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart is an Ohio financial services store offering check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, and facilitated third-party loan access.
description_long:
CheckSmart is a brick-and-mortar financial services retailer with a long-standing presence in Ohio, operating multiple locations across the Columbus metro area and surrounding communities. The Morse Road location sits at the northeast corner of Morse Rd and Cleveland Ave in northeast Columbus. CheckSmart positions itself as a neighborhood financial hub catering to consumers who need in-person access to everyday financial transactions and short-term credit options.

CheckSmart's core in-store services include check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment — services that serve unbanked or underbanked consumers who manage finances outside the traditional banking system. Customers can also obtain a Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card in store, exchange unused gift cards for cash, and handle multiple financial transactions in a single visit. On the lending side, CheckSmart facilitates access to loan products in Ohio through an unaffiliated third-party lender, acting as an intermediary or referral point rather than the actual creditor. Customers are encouraged to schedule appointments online before visiting to streamline the application process.

Several operational details make CheckSmart a practical option for time-constrained consumers. Friday hours run from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM — the longest of any day — and Sunday hours (11:00 AM to 5:00 PM) are available, which is not universal among check cashing storefronts. The online appointment scheduling feature allows customers to arrive prepared with required documents (government-issued ID, proof of income, proof of address, working phone, and valid email), reducing in-store wait time. Geographic coverage is also a convenience factor: five Columbus-area locations plus stores in Heath, Marion, Marysville, Reynoldsburg, Springfield, and Whitehall.

Consumers considering CheckSmart for loan products should exercise caution. The website does not disclose APR ranges, loan amounts, fees, or repayment schedules, and the loans are originated by an unnamed third-party lender. Third-party lending arrangements in Ohio can still carry significant borrowing costs despite state regulatory changes. For transactional services — check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay — CheckSmart is a straightforward, accessible option. Consumers seeking credit should request full loan terms in writing and compare against credit union payday alternative loans or CDFI products before committing.
address: 3429 S East St Ste C, Indianapolis, IN 46227

company_info.headquarters: 3429 S East St Ste C, Indianapolis, IN 46227

pros: Multiple financial services available in a single in-store visit (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay)
Extended Friday hours (8:00 AM–8:00 PM) accommodate working customers
Sunday hours available (11:00 AM–5:00 PM), uncommon among check cashing stores
Online appointment scheduling reduces in-store wait time
Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card available in store — useful for unbanked customers
Gift card exchange for cash available in store
Multiple Columbus-area locations plus broader Ohio presence
cons: Not a direct lender — loans are facilitated through an unnamed third-party lender with no APR or fee disclosure on the website
No online-only loan application; in-store visit required
Limited Saturday hours (9:00 AM–4:00 PM) and shortened Sunday availability
Loan terms, amounts, and costs are completely opaque prior to visiting a store
Short-term lending through third-party arrangements typically carries high borrowing costs
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing or money orders
Customers who need to pay bills, send wire transfers, or obtain money orders without a bank
Ohio residents seeking in-person short-term loan referrals with same-day processing
Consumers who want to exchange unwanted gift cards for cash
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers in Ohio who need a one-stop shop for check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, or bill pay. For loan products, the main caveat is that CheckSmart is not the lender — terms come from an undisclosed third party and are not published online, so borrowers must visit in person to learn what they're actually being offered.
services: Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card issuance
In-store customer service for loan inquiries
